# mnemonist

> An open standard for tool-agnostic AI agent memory with a cognitive CLI. Defines a two-level memory convention — project (`~/.mnemonist/{project}/`) and global (`~/.mnemonist/global/`) — using typed markdown files with YAML frontmatter. CLI commands mirror memory processes: memorize, remember, note, learn, consolidate, reflect, forget. Features working memory inbox, attention scoring, Hebbian reinforcement, consolidation cycles, semantic search (HNSW/IVF-Flat), and TurboQuant vector quantization. Includes a RAG HTTP server. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor, or any AI tool.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/urmzd/mnemonist/blob/main/README.md): Quick start, cognitive CLI usage, and memory types
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/urmzd/mnemonist/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Architecture and development guide
- [Specification](https://github.com/urmzd/mnemonist/blob/main/spec/mnemonist.md): Full specification (levels, file format, dynamic loading, integration)

## API / Key Files

- [spec/mnemonist.md](https://github.com/urmzd/mnemonist/blob/main/spec/mnemonist.md): The formal mnemonist specification
- [crates/mnemonist-core/](https://github.com/urmzd/mnemonist/blob/main/crates/mnemonist-core/): Core types, inbox, config, embeddings
- [crates/mnemonist-cli/](https://github.com/urmzd/mnemonist/blob/main/crates/mnemonist-cli/): Cognitive CLI binary
- [crates/mnemonist-core/src/ann/](https://github.com/urmzd/mnemonist/blob/main/crates/mnemonist-core/src/ann/): ANN indices (HNSW, IVF) and code indexing — submodule of mnemonist-core
- [crates/mnemonist-core/src/quant/](https://github.com/urmzd/mnemonist/blob/main/crates/mnemonist-core/src/quant/): TurboQuant vector quantization — submodule of mnemonist-core
- [skills/mnemonist/SKILL.md](https://github.com/urmzd/mnemonist/blob/main/skills/mnemonist/SKILL.md): Portable agent skill

## Optional

- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/urmzd/mnemonist/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
